message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): 10-site scratch-handle + describe/events sweep (tick 249)

Migrates 10 additional ambient storage-read sites across five CLI dispatch
surfaces in frankenterm/main.rs to the `_with_cx` siblings. This sweep
targets the remaining scratch-handle helpers and verbose-output paths that
survived tick 241's write-surface closeout.

Sites migrated:

1. `reindex` robot path — `storage.get_panes()` → `get_panes_with_cx(&reindex_panes_cx)`
2. `ft workflow status --verbose` — `get_latest_step_log(exec_id)` +
   `get_action_plan(exec_id)` both rebind onto the pre-existing tick-235
   `storage_cx` from the outer scope (no new binding needed)
3. `ft workflow describe --verbose` — `get_action_plan(&execution_id)` +
   `get_step_logs(&execution_id)` reuse the tick-236 `storage_cx` already in
   scope for `get_workflow_with_cx`
4. `ft pane bookmark list` — both `list_pane_bookmarks_by_tag(tag)` and
   `list_pane_bookmarks()` now use shared `storage_cx`
5. `ft events` mutate path — `get_event_annotations(event_id)` →
   `get_event_annotations_with_cx(&annotations_cx, event_id)`
6. `ft events` listing loop — `get_event_annotations(event.id)` rebinds
   onto a loop-shared `ann_cx` declared above the `for` (avoids re-resolving
   `Cx::current()` per iteration)
7. `ft timeline` — `storage.get_timeline(query)` →
   `get_timeline_with_cx(&storage_cx, query)`
8. `ft plan prepare` — `storage.get_prepared_plan(&plan_id)` →
   `get_prepared_plan_with_cx(&storage_cx_plan, &plan_id)`
9. `ft audit stream` — `storage.get_audit_actions_stream(query)` →
   `get_audit_actions_stream_with_cx(&storage_cx_stream, query)`

Uses distinct binding names (`reindex_panes_cx`, `annotations_cx`, `ann_cx`,
`storage_cx_plan`, `storage_cx_stream`) where local `cx` bindings already
exist to avoid shadowing / ambiguity. Where the outer arm already declared
`storage_cx`, reuses that binding directly (tick 247 pattern).

The remaining ambient surface in main.rs now consists almost exclusively of:
- Test-mod call sites (expected to stay ambient)
- One-off admin/debug paths hit fewer than once per session

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 63 (187-249).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 123 sites (113 before + 10).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
